name: Radish Salad
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Gruyere cheese or Swiss cheese, cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the Romaine lettuce into bite-sized pieces.
2. Toss together diced radishes, cubed Gruyere cheese (or Swiss), and chopped scallions in a large bowl, reserving some greens for garnish.
3. In a small bowl, combine mayonnaise, Dijon mustard, and sour cream. Mix well until smooth.
4. Pour the dressing over the radishes and cheese mixture, ensuring all pieces are coated evenly.
5. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow flavors to meld together.
6. To serve, spoon the salad onto individual Romaine lettuce leaves and sprinkle with additional chopped greens.
